title: CreateMania
description: The fourth installment of the CreateMania modpack, now on Fabric!
body:
# **What is Create Mania 3?**

Everything down below but completely different. Removed all the annoying features like thirst and incomplete mods like Northstar (now replaced by Ad Astra), switched over to fabric for better optimization and smoother gameplay.

~~The CreateMania modpack is all about building massive factories and estabilishing automatic trade networks with your friends. Your friend has a resource you need? Trade with them over long distances using scheduled trains. And if they disagree? Blow their base up with long-range artillery cannons!~~

~~With version 2.0 of CreateMania we decided to focus on challenging difficulty and complex base-building. Mobs are much smarter now - zombies will react to sounds, follow light and group up to form massive hordes. Don't worry - use your engineering skills to build blast-resistant walls, barbed wire, electrocuting tesla coils or even guardian turrets! The sky is the limit, or rather not! Be ready to explore different planets with the Galacticraft-inspired Create addon, Northstar.~~

**When using this modpack, please allocate at least 6-8GiB (6000*-8000*MiB) of RAM.**
